title: Carbon Offsets for Travelers in Alaska
summary: There are numerous carbon offsets programs in Alaska that allow travelers to make purchases and offset their trip's emissions. The post Carbon Offsets for Travelers in Alaska appeared first on Alaska Magazine .

title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: August 4, 2022
summary: August 4, 2022: Over the past week, the sea ice has now decreased by a lower rate from last week of 6.31% , from the level on 07/28/2022 of 7.064 M km 2 to 6.618 M km 2 for this week.
